win_condition: Players win cooperatively by eliminating all Invaders (or meeting the Terror Level victory condition). This score tracker is for optional post-game performance comparison, not determining win/loss.

categories.label: Terror Level Reached
categories.description: Optional benchmark: score 1/2/3/4 points for ending at Terror Level I/II/III/IV victory respectively.

categories.label: Blight on Island Card (Penalty)
categories.description: Optional penalty: subtract 1 point per missing blight from healthy island threshold (or track excess blight in play as penalty).

categories.label: Invader Cleanup Bonus
categories.description: Optional bonus for full board cleanup at game end (no towns/cities/explorers).
